summary: Comprehensive testing of Rough Estimate PDF redesign feature. All PDF download functionality working correctly from both RE Projects page (planning user) and CRM Sales page (sales user). PDF generation shows success toast, no console errors during PDF generation. UI dialog shows all required sections (Client Information, Project Details, Scope of Works, Estimated Total purple box).

issues: Scope of Works table shows '-' for Description column - possibly missing item descriptions in seed data, not a code issue

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning about duplicate React keys on /planning-board page - not related to PDF feature but should be addressed
pdfGenerator.js correctly uses 'Rs.' prefix for currency (formatPDFCurrency function at line 14-17)

All PDF elements as per requirements implemented: letterhead, ROUGH ESTIMATE title, CLIENT INFORMATION box, PROJECT DETAILS box, SCOPE OF WORKS table, purple ESTIMATED TOTAL box, disclaimer, footer with GSTIN
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation feature fully functional. Tested: 1) RE Projects page (/crm/re-projects) - click 'Awaiting Approval' tab shows Anbarasan project, download button generates PDF with success toast, 2) CRM Sales page (/crm-sales not /crm/sales) - Anbu lead in 'Rough Estimate Requested' column has RE badge, clicking opens RE Project dialog with 'Download PDF' button, PDF download works with success toast. The PDF generator uses shared utility at /app/frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.js. Currency correctly uses 'Rs.' prefix instead of ₹ symbol (jsPDF Helvetica font limitation).

features_tested.RE Projects Page Load: PASS - Page loads at /crm/re-projects with stats cards and project list
features_tested.Awaiting Approval Tab: PASS - Shows Anbarasan project with 'Submitted for Approval' badge
features_tested.RE Projects PDF Download: PASS - Download button works, 'PDF downloaded successfully!' toast appears
features_tested.CRM Sales Page Load: PASS - Page loads at /crm-sales (not /crm/sales) with kanban board
features_tested.Sales Lead RE Badge: PASS - Anbu lead shows purple RE badge in 'Rough Estimate Requested' column
features_tested.Sales RE Project Dialog: PASS - Dialog shows Client Information, Project Details, Scope of Works, Estimated Total (purple box)
features_tested.Sales RE PDF Download: PASS - 'Download PDF' button works, success toast appears
features_tested.No Console Errors on PDF: PASS - No console errors during PDF generation

pdf_elements_verified.Letterhead: URBAN SPACE BUILDERS with tagline, contact info (phone, email, website, address)
pdf_elements_verified.Title: ROUGH ESTIMATE - centered with Ref and Date
pdf_elements_verified.Project Details Box: Project Name, Square Feet, Building Type, Handover - bordered
pdf_elements_verified.Scope of Works Table: S.No, Description, Qty, Unit, Rate, Amount columns
pdf_elements_verified.Estimated Total: Purple box with Rs. currency format
pdf_elements_verified.Footer: Company name, Terms & Conditions | Privacy Policy, GSTIN, timestamp

console_warnings: Duplicate React key warning on /planning-board - not related to PDF feature
Route warning when navigating directly to /crm/sales (correct URL is /crm-sales)
